title: Reading 001: Hello
chinese_text: 你好。我是学生。你是学生吗？
pinyin: Nǐ hǎo. Wǒ shì xuésheng. Nǐ shì xuésheng ma?
english_translation: Hello. I am a student. Are you a student?
vietnamese_translation: Xin chào. Tôi là học sinh. Bạn là học sinh phải không?
explanation: The passage introduces 我是学生 and asks a yes-no question with 吗.

title: Reading 002: The Teacher
chinese_text: 她是老师。我是学生。老师好。
pinyin: Tā shì lǎoshī. Wǒ shì xuésheng. Lǎoshī hǎo.
english_translation: She is a teacher. I am a student. Hello, teacher.
vietnamese_translation: Cô ấy là giáo viên. Tôi là học sinh. Em chào cô/thầy.
explanation: 她是老师 identifies her role, and 老师好 is a greeting to a teacher.

title: Reading 003: At School
chinese_text: 老师在学校。学生也在学校。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài xuéxiào. Xuésheng yě zài xuéxiào.
english_translation: The teacher is at school. The students are also at school.
vietnamese_translation: Giáo viên ở trường. Học sinh cũng ở trường.
explanation: Both sentences use 在学校 to show location.

title: Reading 004: My Family
chinese_text: 我家有爸爸、妈妈和我。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu bàba, māma hé wǒ.
english_translation: My family has dad, mom, and me.
vietnamese_translation: Nhà tôi có bố, mẹ và tôi.
explanation: 我家有 introduces the people in the family.

title: Reading 005: Dad and Mom
chinese_text: 爸爸是医生。妈妈是老师。
pinyin: Bàba shì yīshēng. Māma shì lǎoshī.
english_translation: Dad is a doctor. Mom is a teacher.
vietnamese_translation: Bố là bác sĩ. Mẹ là giáo viên.
explanation: The structure A 是 B identifies each person's role.

title: Reading 006: A Friend
chinese_text: 他是我的朋友。我们都是学生。
pinyin: Tā shì wǒ de péngyou. Wǒmen dōu shì xuésheng.
english_translation: He is my friend. We are all students.
vietnamese_translation: Anh ấy là bạn của tôi. Chúng tôi đều là học sinh.
explanation: 我的朋友 shows possession, and 都 means all.

title: Reading 007: This Book
chinese_text: 这个是书。那个也是书。
pinyin: Zhè ge shì shū. Nà ge yě shì shū.
english_translation: This one is a book. That one is also a book.
vietnamese_translation: Cái này là sách. Cái kia cũng là sách.
explanation: 这 and 那 point to two things, and 也 shows the second is also a book.

title: Reading 008: Water
chinese_text: 我有水。你有水吗？
pinyin: Wǒ yǒu shuǐ. Nǐ yǒu shuǐ ma?
english_translation: I have water. Do you have water?
vietnamese_translation: Tôi có nước. Bạn có nước không?
explanation: 有 expresses possession, and 吗 turns the second sentence into a question.

title: Reading 009: Tea
chinese_text: 老师喝茶。学生喝水。
pinyin: Lǎoshī hē chá. Xuésheng hē shuǐ.
english_translation: The teacher drinks tea. The student drinks water.
vietnamese_translation: Giáo viên uống trà. Học sinh uống nước.
explanation: The verb 喝 is followed by different drinks.

title: Reading 010: Rice
chinese_text: 中午我吃米饭，也喝水。
pinyin: Zhōngwǔ wǒ chī mǐfàn, yě hē shuǐ.
english_translation: At noon I eat rice and also drink water.
vietnamese_translation: Buổi trưa tôi ăn cơm và cũng uống nước.
explanation: 中午 sets the time; 也 adds another action.

title: Reading 011: Apples
chinese_text: 我喜欢苹果。妈妈也喜欢苹果。
pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan píngguǒ. Māma yě xǐhuan píngguǒ.
english_translation: I like apples. Mom also likes apples.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi thích táo. Mẹ cũng thích táo.
explanation: 也喜欢 shows that mom has the same preference.

title: Reading 012: Buying Fruit
chinese_text: 爸爸去商店买水果和苹果。
pinyin: Bàba qù shāngdiàn mǎi shuǐguǒ hé píngguǒ.
english_translation: Dad goes to the store to buy fruit and apples.
vietnamese_translation: Bố đi cửa hàng mua hoa quả và táo.
explanation: 去商店买 shows purpose: going to the store to buy something.

title: Reading 013: How Much
chinese_text: 这个苹果多少钱？三块。
pinyin: Zhè ge píngguǒ duōshao qián? Sān kuài.
english_translation: How much is this apple? Three yuan.
vietnamese_translation: Quả táo này bao nhiêu tiền? Ba tệ.
explanation: 多少钱 asks price, and 三块 gives the spoken price.

title: Reading 014: Hot Weather
chinese_text: 今天天气很热。我喝水。
pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn rè. Wǒ hē shuǐ.
english_translation: The weather is hot today. I drink water.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay thời tiết rất nóng. Tôi uống nước.
explanation: 很热 describes the weather, and the second sentence gives the action.

title: Reading 015: Cold Weather
chinese_text: 明天天气很冷。妈妈在家。
pinyin: Míngtiān tiānqì hěn lěng. Māma zài jiā.
english_translation: The weather will be cold tomorrow. Mom is at home.
vietnamese_translation: Ngày mai thời tiết rất lạnh. Mẹ ở nhà.
explanation: 明天 gives future time, and 在家 gives location.

title: Reading 016: Rain
chinese_text: 今天下雨。老师不去学校。
pinyin: Jīntiān xià yǔ. Lǎoshī bú qù xuéxiào.
english_translation: It is raining today. The teacher does not go to school.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay trời mưa. Giáo viên không đi học/trường.

comprehension_questions.question: Where does the teacher not go?

explanation: 不去学校 means the teacher does not go to school.

title: Reading 017: Today and Tomorrow
chinese_text: 今天我在家。明天我去学校。
pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ zài jiā. Míngtiān wǒ qù xuéxiào.
english_translation: Today I am at home. Tomorrow I go to school.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay tôi ở nhà. Ngày mai tôi đi học.

comprehension_questions.question: Where will the person go tomorrow?

explanation: 今天 and 明天 mark two different days.

title: Reading 018: Yesterday
chinese_text: 昨天我看书。今天我学习汉语。
pinyin: Zuótiān wǒ kàn shū. Jīntiān wǒ xuéxí Hànyǔ.
english_translation: Yesterday I read a book. Today I study Chinese.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm qua tôi đọc sách. Hôm nay tôi học tiếng Trung.

comprehension_questions.question: What did the person do yesterday?
What does the person study today?

explanation: 昨天 and 今天 show the timing of two actions.

title: Reading 019: What Time
chinese_text: 现在几点？现在八点。
pinyin: Xiànzài jǐ diǎn? Xiànzài bā diǎn.
english_translation: What time is it now? It is eight o'clock now.
vietnamese_translation: Bây giờ mấy giờ? Bây giờ tám giờ.
explanation: 几点 asks about clock time.

title: Reading 020: Morning
chinese_text: 上午我学习。下午我看书。
pinyin: Shàngwǔ wǒ xuéxí. Xiàwǔ wǒ kàn shū.
english_translation: In the morning I study. In the afternoon I read.
vietnamese_translation: Buổi sáng tôi học. Buổi chiều tôi đọc sách.

comprehension_questions.question: What does the person do in the morning?
What does the person do in the afternoon?

explanation: 上午 and 下午 appear before the actions.

title: Reading 021: Noon Meal
chinese_text: 中午我们在饭店吃米饭。
pinyin: Zhōngwǔ wǒmen zài fàndiàn chī mǐfàn.
english_translation: At noon we eat rice at the restaurant.
vietnamese_translation: Buổi trưa chúng tôi ăn cơm ở nhà hàng.
explanation: 在饭店 gives the location of the action 吃米饭.

title: Reading 022: Sleep
chinese_text: 今天我很冷。我想睡觉。
pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ hěn lěng. Wǒ xiǎng shuìjiào.
english_translation: Today I am cold. I want to sleep.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay tôi lạnh. Tôi muốn ngủ.

comprehension_questions.question: What does the person want to do?

explanation: 想睡觉 means want to sleep.

title: Reading 023: Reading a Book
chinese_text: 她在学校看书。老师也看书。
pinyin: Tā zài xuéxiào kàn shū. Lǎoshī yě kàn shū.
english_translation: She reads at school. The teacher also reads.
vietnamese_translation: Cô ấy đọc sách ở trường. Giáo viên cũng đọc sách.
explanation: 在学校 comes before the action 看书.

title: Reading 024: Studying Chinese
chinese_text: 我们学习汉语。老师说汉语。
pinyin: Wǒmen xuéxí Hànyǔ. Lǎoshī shuō Hànyǔ.
english_translation: We study Chinese. The teacher speaks Chinese.
vietnamese_translation: Chúng tôi học tiếng Trung. Giáo viên nói tiếng Trung.
explanation: 汉语 is used as the object of both 学习 and 说.

title: Reading 025: Writing Characters
chinese_text: 我会写字。你会写吗？
pinyin: Wǒ huì xiě zì. Nǐ huì xiě ma?
english_translation: I can write characters. Can you write?
vietnamese_translation: Tôi biết viết chữ. Bạn biết viết không?
explanation: 会 expresses learned ability.

title: Reading 026: Speaking
chinese_text: 他会说话，也会说汉语。
pinyin: Tā huì shuōhuà, yě huì shuō Hànyǔ.
english_translation: He can speak, and he can also speak Chinese.
vietnamese_translation: Anh ấy biết nói, và cũng biết nói tiếng Trung.
explanation: 也会 adds another ability.

title: Reading 027: Listening
chinese_text: 学生听老师说话。老师很高兴。
pinyin: Xuésheng tīng lǎoshī shuōhuà. Lǎoshī hěn gāoxìng.
english_translation: The student listens to the teacher speak. The teacher is happy.
vietnamese_translation: Học sinh nghe giáo viên nói. Giáo viên rất vui.

comprehension_questions.question: Who does the student listen to?

explanation: 听老师说话 means listen to the teacher speak.

title: Reading 028: Television
chinese_text: 下午我看电视。爸爸也看。
pinyin: Xiàwǔ wǒ kàn diànshì. Bàba yě kàn.
english_translation: In the afternoon I watch TV. Dad also watches.
vietnamese_translation: Buổi chiều tôi xem TV. Bố cũng xem.
explanation: 看电视 means watch TV; 也 shows dad does the same.

title: Reading 029: Movie
chinese_text: 今天我们看电影。电影很好。
pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen kàn diànyǐng. Diànyǐng hěn hǎo.
english_translation: Today we watch a movie. The movie is good.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay chúng tôi xem phim. Bộ phim rất hay.
explanation: 很好 evaluates the movie positively.

title: Reading 030: Computer
chinese_text: 这个电脑很好。老师看电脑。
pinyin: Zhè ge diànnǎo hěn hǎo. Lǎoshī kàn diànnǎo.
english_translation: This computer is good. The teacher looks at the computer.
vietnamese_translation: Máy tính này rất tốt. Giáo viên xem máy tính.
explanation: 这个电脑 is described with 很好.

title: Reading 031: Phone Call
chinese_text: 喂，妈妈。我在学校。我打电话。
pinyin: Wéi, māma. Wǒ zài xuéxiào. Wǒ dǎ diànhuà.
english_translation: Hello, Mom. I am at school. I am making a phone call.
vietnamese_translation: Alo, mẹ. Con ở trường. Con gọi điện thoại.
explanation: 喂 is used when answering or starting a phone call.

title: Reading 032: Taxi
chinese_text: 我坐出租车去医院看医生。
pinyin: Wǒ zuò chūzūchē qù yīyuàn kàn yīshēng.
english_translation: I take a taxi to the hospital to see a doctor.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi đi taxi đến bệnh viện gặp bác sĩ.
explanation: 坐出租车 means take a taxi, and 去医院 gives the destination.

title: Reading 033: Airplane
chinese_text: 明天爸爸坐飞机去北京。
pinyin: Míngtiān bàba zuò fēijī qù Běijīng.
english_translation: Tomorrow Dad takes a plane to Beijing.
vietnamese_translation: Ngày mai bố đi máy bay đến Bắc Kinh.
explanation: 坐飞机去北京 means take a plane to Beijing.

title: Reading 034: Hotel
chinese_text: 我们在北京住饭店。饭店很大。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài Běijīng zhù fàndiàn. Fàndiàn hěn dà.
english_translation: We stay at a hotel in Beijing. The hotel is big.
vietnamese_translation: Chúng tôi ở khách sạn tại Bắc Kinh. Khách sạn rất lớn.
explanation: 饭店 can mean hotel/restaurant in beginner HSK context; here 住饭店 means stay at a hotel.

title: Reading 035: Hospital
chinese_text: 医生在医院。妈妈去医院看医生。
pinyin: Yīshēng zài yīyuàn. Māma qù yīyuàn kàn yīshēng.
english_translation: The doctor is at the hospital. Mom goes to the hospital to see the doctor.
vietnamese_translation: Bác sĩ ở bệnh viện. Mẹ đi bệnh viện khám bác sĩ.
explanation: 在医院 gives the doctor's location, and 去医院 shows mom's destination.

title: Reading 036: Chair and Table
chinese_text: 桌子前面有椅子。书在桌子上。
pinyin: Zhuōzi qiánmiàn yǒu yǐzi. Shū zài zhuōzi shàng.
english_translation: There is a chair in front of the table. The book is on the table.
vietnamese_translation: Trước bàn có ghế. Sách ở trên bàn.

comprehension_questions.question: What is in front of the table?

explanation: 前面 and 上 are location words.

title: Reading 037: In the Room
chinese_text: 家里有桌子、椅子和电脑。
pinyin: Jiā lǐ yǒu zhuōzi, yǐzi hé diànnǎo.
english_translation: At home there are a table, chairs, and a computer.
vietnamese_translation: Trong nhà có bàn, ghế và máy tính.

comprehension_questions.question: What does 家里 mean here?

explanation: Place + 有 introduces things that exist in that place.

title: Reading 038: Front and Back
chinese_text: 老师在前面。学生在后面。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài qiánmiàn. Xuésheng zài hòumiàn.
english_translation: The teacher is in front. The students are behind.
vietnamese_translation: Giáo viên ở phía trước. Học sinh ở phía sau.
explanation: 前面 and 后面 describe relative position.

title: Reading 039: Going Home
chinese_text: 下午学生回家。老师也回家。
pinyin: Xiàwǔ xuésheng huí jiā. Lǎoshī yě huí jiā.
english_translation: In the afternoon the students go home. The teacher also goes home.
vietnamese_translation: Buổi chiều học sinh về nhà. Giáo viên cũng về nhà.

comprehension_questions.question: When do the students go home?

explanation: 回家 means return/go home, and 也 shows the teacher does the same.

title: Reading 040: Coming to School
chinese_text: 上午老师来学校。学生也来学校。
pinyin: Shàngwǔ lǎoshī lái xuéxiào. Xuésheng yě lái xuéxiào.
english_translation: In the morning the teacher comes to school. The students also come to school.
vietnamese_translation: Buổi sáng giáo viên đến trường. Học sinh cũng đến trường.

comprehension_questions.question: Who comes to school in the morning?

explanation: 来学校 means come to school.

title: Reading 041: Beijing
chinese_text: 我在北京学习汉语。北京很大。
pinyin: Wǒ zài Běijīng xuéxí Hànyǔ. Běijīng hěn dà.
english_translation: I study Chinese in Beijing. Beijing is big.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi học tiếng Trung ở Bắc Kinh. Bắc Kinh rất lớn.

comprehension_questions.question: Where does the person study Chinese?

explanation: 在北京 shows location, and 很大 describes Beijing.

title: Reading 042: China
chinese_text: 他是中国人。他会说汉语。
pinyin: Tā shì Zhōngguó rén. Tā huì shuō Hànyǔ.
english_translation: He is Chinese. He can speak Chinese.
vietnamese_translation: Anh ấy là người Trung Quốc. Anh ấy biết nói tiếng Trung.
explanation: 中国人 means Chinese person, and 会说汉语 means can speak Chinese.

title: Reading 043: Where Do You Live
chinese_text: 你住哪儿？我住北京。
pinyin: Nǐ zhù nǎr? Wǒ zhù Běijīng.
english_translation: Where do you live? I live in Beijing.
vietnamese_translation: Bạn sống ở đâu? Tôi sống ở Bắc Kinh.
explanation: 哪儿 asks about location.

title: Reading 044: Knowing a Friend
chinese_text: 我认识他。他是我朋友。
pinyin: Wǒ rènshi tā. Tā shì wǒ péngyou.
english_translation: I know him. He is my friend.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi quen anh ấy. Anh ấy là bạn tôi.
explanation: 认识 means to know or be acquainted with someone.

title: Reading 045: Who Is She
chinese_text: 她是谁？她是老师。
pinyin: Tā shì shéi? Tā shì lǎoshī.
english_translation: Who is she? She is a teacher.
vietnamese_translation: Cô ấy là ai? Cô ấy là giáo viên.
explanation: 谁 asks about a person.

title: Reading 046: What Is This
chinese_text: 这是什么？这是书。
pinyin: Zhè shì shénme? Zhè shì shū.
english_translation: What is this? This is a book.
vietnamese_translation: Đây là cái gì? Đây là sách.
explanation: 什么 asks for the identity of the thing.

title: Reading 047: Where Is School
chinese_text: 学校在哪儿？学校在前面。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zài nǎr? Xuéxiào zài qiánmiàn.
english_translation: Where is the school? The school is in front.
vietnamese_translation: Trường ở đâu? Trường ở phía trước.
explanation: 在哪儿 asks for location.

title: Reading 048: Which Student
chinese_text: 哪个学生是你的朋友？
pinyin: Nǎ ge xuésheng shì nǐ de péngyou?
english_translation: Which student is your friend?
vietnamese_translation: Học sinh nào là bạn của bạn?
explanation: 哪个 asks which one from a group.

title: Reading 049: How Many People
chinese_text: 你家有几个人？我家有三个人。
pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ ge rén? Wǒ jiā yǒu sān ge rén.
english_translation: How many people are in your family? My family has three people.
vietnamese_translation: Nhà bạn có mấy người? Nhà tôi có ba người.

comprehension_questions.question: What is asked?
options: Number of people in the family

comprehension_questions.question: How many people are in my family?

answer_key.q1: Number of people in the family

explanation: 几个人 asks for a small number of people.

title: Reading 050: Age
chinese_text: 你多大？我二十岁。
pinyin: Nǐ duō dà? Wǒ èrshí suì.
english_translation: How old are you? I am twenty years old.
vietnamese_translation: Bạn bao nhiêu tuổi? Tôi hai mươi tuổi.
explanation: 多大 asks age, and 岁 marks years old.

title: Reading 051: Birthday Date
chinese_text: 今天是一月一号。明天是二号。
pinyin: Jīntiān shì yī yuè yī hào. Míngtiān shì èr hào.
english_translation: Today is January 1st. Tomorrow is the 2nd.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay là ngày 1 tháng 1. Ngày mai là mùng 2.
explanation: Chinese date order is month before day.

title: Reading 052: Year and Month
chinese_text: 现在是七月。七月天气很热。
pinyin: Xiànzài shì qī yuè. Qī yuè tiānqì hěn rè.
english_translation: Now it is July. The weather in July is hot.
vietnamese_translation: Bây giờ là tháng 7. Thời tiết tháng 7 rất nóng.

comprehension_questions.question: How is the weather in July?

explanation: 月 marks the month, and 很热 describes the weather.

title: Reading 053: Weekday
chinese_text: 今天星期一。明天星期二。
pinyin: Jīntiān xīngqī yī. Míngtiān xīngqī èr.
english_translation: Today is Monday. Tomorrow is Tuesday.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay là thứ Hai. Ngày mai là thứ Ba.
explanation: 星期 plus a number gives the weekday.

title: Reading 054: Good Weather
chinese_text: 今天天气很好。我们去学校。
pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo. Wǒmen qù xuéxiào.
english_translation: The weather is good today. We go to school.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay thời tiết rất tốt. Chúng tôi đi học.
explanation: 很好 describes the weather positively.

title: Reading 055: Too Hot
chinese_text: 水太热了。我不喝。
pinyin: Shuǐ tài rè le. Wǒ bù hē.
english_translation: The water is too hot. I do not drink it.
vietnamese_translation: Nước nóng quá. Tôi không uống.
explanation: 太...了 expresses a strong degree; 不喝 is negative.

title: Reading 056: Some Fruit
chinese_text: 桌子上有水果。我吃苹果。
pinyin: Zhuōzi shàng yǒu shuǐguǒ. Wǒ chī píngguǒ.
english_translation: There is fruit on the table. I eat an apple.
vietnamese_translation: Trên bàn có hoa quả. Tôi ăn táo.
explanation: 桌子上有 introduces what is on the table.

title: Reading 057: Dog
chinese_text: 我家有狗。狗很大。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu gǒu. Gǒu hěn dà.
english_translation: My family has a dog. The dog is big.
vietnamese_translation: Nhà tôi có chó. Con chó rất to.
explanation: 狗 is the subject of the second sentence and is described with 很大.

title: Reading 058: Cat
chinese_text: 她有猫。猫很小，也很漂亮。
pinyin: Tā yǒu māo. Māo hěn xiǎo, yě hěn piàoliang.
english_translation: She has a cat. The cat is small and also pretty.
vietnamese_translation: Cô ấy có mèo. Con mèo nhỏ và cũng rất đẹp.
explanation: 也很漂亮 adds another description of the cat.

title: Reading 059: Daughter
chinese_text: 我女儿是学生。她在学校。
pinyin: Wǒ nǚ'ér shì xuésheng. Tā zài xuéxiào.
english_translation: My daughter is a student. She is at school.
vietnamese_translation: Con gái tôi là học sinh. Con bé ở trường.
explanation: 女儿 is identified as a student, then her location is given.

title: Reading 060: Son
chinese_text: 我儿子不是老师。他是学生。
pinyin: Wǒ érzi bú shì lǎoshī. Tā shì xuésheng.
english_translation: My son is not a teacher. He is a student.
vietnamese_translation: Con trai tôi không phải giáo viên. Nó là học sinh.
explanation: 不是 negates identity, and the next sentence gives the correct identity.

title: Reading 061: Mister and Miss
chinese_text: 先生和小姐都在商店买东西。
pinyin: Xiānsheng hé xiǎojiě dōu zài shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi.
english_translation: The gentleman and the young lady are both buying things at the store.
vietnamese_translation: Ông ấy và cô ấy đều đang mua đồ ở cửa hàng.
explanation: 都 applies to both 先生 and 小姐.

title: Reading 062: Name
chinese_text: 你叫什么名字？我叫学生。
pinyin: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi? Wǒ jiào xuésheng.
english_translation: What is your name? I am called Student.
vietnamese_translation: Bạn tên là gì? Tôi tên là Học Sinh.
explanation: 叫什么名字 is the standard HSK1 pattern for asking a name.

title: Reading 063: Happy
chinese_text: 今天我很高兴。我看见朋友。
pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ hěn gāoxìng. Wǒ kànjiàn péngyou.
english_translation: Today I am happy. I see a friend.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay tôi rất vui. Tôi nhìn thấy bạn.
explanation: 看见 means to see, and 很高兴 describes feeling.

title: Reading 064: Likes
chinese_text: 我喜欢看书。他喜欢看电影。
pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuan kàn shū. Tā xǐhuan kàn diànyǐng.
english_translation: I like reading books. He likes watching movies.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi thích đọc sách. Anh ấy thích xem phim.
explanation: 喜欢 can be followed by a verb phrase.

title: Reading 065: Want Water
chinese_text: 我想喝水。你想喝茶吗？
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng hē shuǐ. Nǐ xiǎng hē chá ma?
english_translation: I want to drink water. Do you want to drink tea?
vietnamese_translation: Tôi muốn uống nước. Bạn muốn uống trà không?

comprehension_questions.question: What does the speaker want to drink?
What is the listener asked about?

explanation: 想 + verb expresses wanting to do something.

title: Reading 066: Can Come
chinese_text: 明天你能来吗？我能来。
pinyin: Míngtiān nǐ néng lái ma? Wǒ néng lái.
english_translation: Can you come tomorrow? I can come.
vietnamese_translation: Ngày mai bạn có thể đến không? Tôi có thể đến.

comprehension_questions.question: When is the person asked to come?

explanation: 能来 means be able to come.

title: Reading 067: Please Sit
chinese_text: 请坐。这个椅子很好。
pinyin: Qǐng zuò. Zhè ge yǐzi hěn hǎo.
english_translation: Please sit. This chair is good.
vietnamese_translation: Mời ngồi. Cái ghế này rất tốt.
explanation: 请 makes the command polite.

title: Reading 068: Sorry
chinese_text: 对不起，我没有书。没关系。
pinyin: Duìbuqǐ, wǒ méi yǒu shū. Méi guānxi.
english_translation: Sorry, I do not have a book. It's okay.
vietnamese_translation: Xin lỗi, tôi không có sách. Không sao.

comprehension_questions.question: What does the speaker not have?

explanation: 没有 is the negative form of 有.

title: Reading 069: Thanks
chinese_text: 请喝茶。谢谢。不客气。
pinyin: Qǐng hē chá. Xièxie. Bú kèqi.
english_translation: Please drink tea. Thank you. You're welcome.
vietnamese_translation: Mời uống trà. Cảm ơn. Không có gì.
explanation: 谢谢 and 不客气 form a basic polite exchange.

title: Reading 070: Goodbye
chinese_text: 老师说再见。学生也说再见。
pinyin: Lǎoshī shuō zàijiàn. Xuésheng yě shuō zàijiàn.
english_translation: The teacher says goodbye. The students also say goodbye.
vietnamese_translation: Giáo viên nói tạm biệt. Học sinh cũng nói tạm biệt.
explanation: 也说再见 shows the students repeat the same farewell.

title: Reading 071: A Little
chinese_text: 我会说一点儿汉语。老师很高兴。
pinyin: Wǒ huì shuō yìdiǎnr Hànyǔ. Lǎoshī hěn gāoxìng.
english_translation: I can speak a little Chinese. The teacher is happy.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi biết nói một chút tiếng Trung. Giáo viên rất vui.

comprehension_questions.question: How much Chinese can the person speak?

explanation: 一点儿 means a little amount.

title: Reading 072: Many and Few
chinese_text: 学校有很多学生。老师不多。
pinyin: Xuéxiào yǒu hěn duō xuésheng. Lǎoshī bù duō.
english_translation: The school has many students. There are not many teachers.
vietnamese_translation: Trường có rất nhiều học sinh. Giáo viên không nhiều.

comprehension_questions.question: What does the school have many of?

explanation: 很 + 多 means many, while 不多 means not many.

title: Reading 073: Big and Small
chinese_text: 这个学校很大。那个商店很小。
pinyin: Zhè ge xuéxiào hěn dà. Nà ge shāngdiàn hěn xiǎo.
english_translation: This school is big. That store is small.
vietnamese_translation: Trường này rất lớn. Cửa hàng kia rất nhỏ.
explanation: 很大 and 很小 describe size.

title: Reading 074: Pretty
chinese_text: 她的女儿很漂亮，也很高兴。
pinyin: Tā de nǚ'ér hěn piàoliang, yě hěn gāoxìng.
english_translation: Her daughter is pretty and also happy.
vietnamese_translation: Con gái của cô ấy rất xinh và cũng rất vui.

comprehension_questions.question: How else does the daughter feel?

explanation: 也很高兴 adds a second adjective.

title: Reading 075: How Is It
chinese_text: 这个电影怎么样？这个电影很好。
pinyin: Zhè ge diànyǐng zěnmeyàng? Zhè ge diànyǐng hěn hǎo.
english_translation: How is this movie? This movie is good.
vietnamese_translation: Bộ phim này thế nào? Bộ phim này rất hay.
explanation: 怎么样 asks how something is.

title: Reading 076: Work
chinese_text: 爸爸在医院工作。妈妈在学校工作。
pinyin: Bàba zài yīyuàn gōngzuò. Māma zài xuéxiào gōngzuò.
english_translation: Dad works at the hospital. Mom works at school.
vietnamese_translation: Bố làm việc ở bệnh viện. Mẹ làm việc ở trường.
explanation: 在 + place + 工作 shows where someone works.

title: Reading 077: Dishes
chinese_text: 饭店有很多菜。我喜欢这个菜。
pinyin: Fàndiàn yǒu hěn duō cài. Wǒ xǐhuan zhè ge cài.
english_translation: The restaurant has many dishes. I like this dish.
vietnamese_translation: Nhà hàng có nhiều món ăn. Tôi thích món này.

comprehension_questions.question: Which dish does the speaker like?

explanation: 菜 means dish/food, and 这个菜 identifies a specific dish.

title: Reading 078: Cup
chinese_text: 桌子上有杯子。杯子里有水。
pinyin: Zhuōzi shàng yǒu bēizi. Bēizi lǐ yǒu shuǐ.
english_translation: There is a cup on the table. There is water in the cup.
vietnamese_translation: Trên bàn có cái cốc. Trong cốc có nước.
explanation: 上 and 里 show location.

title: Reading 079: Store Is Open
chinese_text: 商店开了。我去买东西。
pinyin: Shāngdiàn kāi le. Wǒ qù mǎi dōngxi.
english_translation: The store is open now. I go to buy things.
vietnamese_translation: Cửa hàng mở rồi. Tôi đi mua đồ.
explanation: 了 shows a new situation: the store has opened.

title: Reading 080: I See You
chinese_text: 我看见你。你在学校前面。
pinyin: Wǒ kànjiàn nǐ. Nǐ zài xuéxiào qiánmiàn.
english_translation: I see you. You are in front of the school.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi nhìn thấy bạn. Bạn ở trước trường.
explanation: 看见 means see, and 学校前面 gives the location.

title: Reading 081: Return to Beijing
chinese_text: 爸爸今天回北京。我们很高兴。
pinyin: Bàba jīntiān huí Běijīng. Wǒmen hěn gāoxìng.
english_translation: Dad returns to Beijing today. We are happy.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay bố về Bắc Kinh. Chúng tôi rất vui.
explanation: 回北京 means return to Beijing.

title: Reading 082: Sitting
chinese_text: 学生坐在椅子上。老师在前面。
pinyin: Xuésheng zuò zài yǐzi shàng. Lǎoshī zài qiánmiàn.
english_translation: The student sits on the chair. The teacher is in front.
vietnamese_translation: Học sinh ngồi trên ghế. Giáo viên ở phía trước.
explanation: 坐在椅子上 describes sitting on the chair.

title: Reading 083: Living at Home
chinese_text: 我和爸爸妈妈住在中国。
pinyin: Wǒ hé bàba māma zhù zài Zhōngguó.
english_translation: My parents and I live in China.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi và bố mẹ sống ở Trung Quốc.
explanation: 住在中国 gives the place of living.

title: Reading 084: Doing Homework
chinese_text: 我在家做工作。妈妈看书。
pinyin: Wǒ zài jiā zuò gōngzuò. Māma kàn shū.
english_translation: I do work at home. Mom reads a book.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi làm việc ở nhà. Mẹ đọc sách.
explanation: 在家 shows where the action 做工作 happens.

title: Reading 085: Writing at School
chinese_text: 学生在学校写字。老师看。
pinyin: Xuésheng zài xuéxiào xiě zì. Lǎoshī kàn.
english_translation: The student writes characters at school. The teacher watches.
vietnamese_translation: Học sinh viết chữ ở trường. Giáo viên xem.
explanation: 写字 is the action, and 在学校 gives the location.

title: Reading 086: Classmates
chinese_text: 我们是同学。我们都学习汉语。
pinyin: Wǒmen shì tóngxué. Wǒmen dōu xuéxí Hànyǔ.
english_translation: We are classmates. We all study Chinese.
vietnamese_translation: Chúng tôi là bạn học. Chúng tôi đều học tiếng Trung.
explanation: 同学 means classmate, and 都 applies to all of 我们.

title: Reading 087: No Money
chinese_text: 我没有钱。我不买东西。
pinyin: Wǒ méi yǒu qián. Wǒ bù mǎi dōngxi.
english_translation: I do not have money. I do not buy things.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi không có tiền. Tôi không mua đồ.

comprehension_questions.question: What does the person not have?
What does the person not do?

explanation: 没有钱 explains why the person does not buy things.

title: Reading 088: Buying Things
chinese_text: 妈妈有钱。她去商店买东西。
pinyin: Māma yǒu qián. Tā qù shāngdiàn mǎi dōngxi.
english_translation: Mom has money. She goes to the store to buy things.
vietnamese_translation: Mẹ có tiền. Mẹ đi cửa hàng mua đồ.
explanation: 去商店买东西 shows destination and purpose.

title: Reading 089: Now
chinese_text: 现在我在学校。现在老师说话。
pinyin: Xiànzài wǒ zài xuéxiào. Xiànzài lǎoshī shuōhuà.
english_translation: Now I am at school. Now the teacher is speaking.
vietnamese_translation: Bây giờ tôi ở trường. Bây giờ giáo viên đang nói.
explanation: 现在 sets the present time for both sentences.

title: Reading 090: In Front of Home
chinese_text: 我家前面有商店，后面有学校。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā qiánmiàn yǒu shāngdiàn, hòumiàn yǒu xuéxiào.
english_translation: In front of my home there is a store, and behind it there is a school.
vietnamese_translation: Trước nhà tôi có cửa hàng, phía sau có trường học.

comprehension_questions.question: What is in front of the home?

explanation: 前面 and 后面 contrast two locations.

title: Reading 091: Everyone at Home
chinese_text: 爸爸、妈妈和我都在家。
pinyin: Bàba, māma hé wǒ dōu zài jiā.
english_translation: Dad, mom, and I are all at home.
vietnamese_translation: Bố, mẹ và tôi đều ở nhà.
explanation: 都 means all members of the listed group are at home.

title: Reading 092: Also a Teacher
chinese_text: 他是老师。她也是老师。
pinyin: Tā shì lǎoshī. Tā yě shì lǎoshī.
english_translation: He is a teacher. She is also a teacher.
vietnamese_translation: Anh ấy là giáo viên. Cô ấy cũng là giáo viên.
explanation: 也 comes before 是 to mean also is.

title: Reading 093: Both Like Tea
chinese_text: 我和朋友都喜欢喝茶。
pinyin: Wǒ hé péngyou dōu xǐhuan hē chá.
english_translation: My friend and I both like drinking tea.
vietnamese_translation: Tôi và bạn đều thích uống trà.
explanation: 都 applies to both 我 and 朋友.

title: Reading 094: Morning Call
chinese_text: 上午妈妈打电话。她说：你好吗？
pinyin: Shàngwǔ māma dǎ diànhuà. Tā shuō: Nǐ hǎo ma?
english_translation: In the morning Mom makes a phone call. She says: How are you?
vietnamese_translation: Buổi sáng mẹ gọi điện. Mẹ nói: Bạn khỏe không?
explanation: 你好吗 is a simple greeting question.

title: Reading 095: Eating at Home
chinese_text: 今天我们不去饭店。我们在家吃米饭。
pinyin: Jīntiān wǒmen bú qù fàndiàn. Wǒmen zài jiā chī mǐfàn.
english_translation: Today we do not go to the restaurant. We eat rice at home.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay chúng tôi không đi nhà hàng. Chúng tôi ăn cơm ở nhà.

comprehension_questions.question: Do they go to the restaurant today?

explanation: 不去 negates going, and 在家吃饭 gives the alternative.

title: Reading 096: Doctor's Question
chinese_text: 医生说：你怎么样？我说：我很好。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō: Nǐ zěnmeyàng? Wǒ shuō: Wǒ hěn hǎo.
english_translation: The doctor says: How are you? I say: I am fine.
vietnamese_translation: Bác sĩ nói: Bạn thế nào? Tôi nói: Tôi khỏe.
explanation: 怎么样 asks about condition, and 很好 answers positively.

title: Reading 097: Asking for a Book
chinese_text: 老师有书吗？老师说：有。
pinyin: Lǎoshī yǒu shū ma? Lǎoshī shuō: Yǒu.
english_translation: Does the teacher have a book? The teacher says: Yes.
vietnamese_translation: Giáo viên có sách không? Giáo viên nói: Có.

comprehension_questions.question: What does the question ask?
options: Whether the teacher has a book

comprehension_questions.question: Does the teacher have a book?

answer_key.q1: Whether the teacher has a book

explanation: 有 is repeated as a short positive answer.

title: Reading 098: No Tea
chinese_text: 家里没有茶。我喝水。
pinyin: Jiā lǐ méi yǒu chá. Wǒ hē shuǐ.
english_translation: There is no tea at home. I drink water.
vietnamese_translation: Trong nhà không có trà. Tôi uống nước.
explanation: 没有 negates existence, and the second sentence gives the replacement drink.

title: Reading 099: Review Day
chinese_text: 星期天我在家看书，学习汉语。
pinyin: Xīngqītiān wǒ zài jiā kàn shū, xuéxí Hànyǔ.
english_translation: On Sunday I read at home and study Chinese.
vietnamese_translation: Chủ nhật tôi đọc sách ở nhà và học tiếng Trung.
explanation: 星期天 gives the day, and 在家 gives the location.

title: Reading 100: HSK1 Mini Passage
chinese_text: 今天天气很好。我和朋友去学校学习汉语。我们都很高兴。
pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo. Wǒ hé péngyou qù xuéxiào xuéxí Hànyǔ. Wǒmen dōu hěn gāoxìng.
english_translation: The weather is good today. My friend and I go to school to study Chinese. We are all happy.
vietnamese_translation: Hôm nay thời tiết rất tốt. Tôi và bạn đi học tiếng Trung ở trường. Chúng tôi đều rất vui.

comprehension_questions.question: Where do the speaker and friend go?

explanation: This final passage combines weather, people, school, study, and emotion using HSK1 vocabulary.
